Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Ooh. Well, that's a nice change of pace. Other Kweebecs like to tell me that I'm 'past my prime' and whatnot.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Even when no one's asking for nor cares about their opinion. The gall.

Line.Text: I'll let you in on a little secret, sprout. I haven't been interested for the past fifty years. I'm still not interested.

Choices.Text: I was just curious. I wasn't planning on getting together with you.
I never said that I wasn't disappointed.
Yeah, and I thought that until I saw that you look more like a year-old barrel of compost.
